headline.purpose: Section titles and major narrative shifts.

shadows.name: header-float
shadows.purpose: Fixed header and high-priority navigation surfaces.

motion.name: spring-standard
motion.purpose: Section reveal and card interaction timing.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button for hero and decisive commands.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 40px; padding: 10px 32px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: #e65c06; color: #ffffff; font-family: Geist, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 300ms ease, background 300ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #f47724; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f47724; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action with a real border and theme-safe background.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { height: 40px; padding: 10px 32px; border: 1px solid #d2d9e3; border-radius: 8px; background: #f9fafb; color: #121a2b; font-family: Geist, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 300ms ease, border-color 300ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: #e65c06; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e65c06; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Capability Chip
components.description: Small icon-led proof point for hero and section labels.
components.html: AI agents
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 14px; border: 1px solid #d2d9e3; border-radius: 999px; background: #ffffffcc; color: #121a2b; font-family: Geist, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-chip svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; color: #e65c06; }

components.name: Standard Card
components.description: Default project, skill, timeline, and certification surface.
components.html:
Project index

Real-Time AI Face Recognition System

High-throughput face tracking system using YOLO and vector retrieval.
components.css: .ds-card { max-width: 420px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #d2d9e3; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #121a2b; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.05); font-family: Geist, Arial, sans-serif; transition: border-color 300ms ease, transform 300ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #e65c06; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-label { margin: 0 0 12px; color: #e65c06; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 12px; font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.15; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: #4b5563; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Floating Navigation
components.description: Rounded fixed header with translucent surface and compact labels.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; gap: 8px; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #d2d9e3; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(249,250,251,0.86); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.08); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); font-family: Geist, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-nav a { padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 999px; color: #121a2b; text-decoration: none; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 650; transition: background 300ms ease, color 300ms ease; } .ds-nav a:hover { background: rgba(18,26,43,0.06); color: #e65c06; }

narrative.overview: This portfolio should feel like a precise engineering workbench: clean enough to scan quickly, technical enough to show real capability, and warm enough to feel like a person built it. The brand is not a generic AI landing page. It is a student engineer showing tangible systems: agents, vision, model architecture, APIs, repositories, and proof of practice.
keyCharacteristics: Asymmetric page rhythm with left-aligned section headings.
One primary accent: confident orange used sparingly.
Cyan only as a secondary technical signal.
Solid, readable surfaces in both light and dark mode.
Icon-led skill and proof elements, not percentage bars.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Orange is the only primary accent. Do not add purple, rainbow gradients, or neon color families.

rules.name: The Dark Contrast Rule
rules.body: Dark mode surfaces must remain readable without relying on glow. Cards, Three.js panels, and chips need real foreground/background contrast.

rules.name: The No Gradient Type Rule
rules.body: Do not use gradient text for headings. Use size, weight, spacing, and color hierarchy instead.

rules.name: The Flat First Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Hover may lift slightly, but never use decorative glow as the main way to separate content.

dos: Do keep section headers left-aligned or asymmetrically paired with supporting content.
Do use icons for skills, proof chips, social buttons, and technical categories.
Do use solid readable surfaces for project, skill, timeline, and certification cards.
Do keep cards at 8px radius and use borders as the main content separator.
Do verify both light and dark mode after touching the hero scene or theme tokens.
donts: Don't bring back skill percentage bars or visible level scoring.
Don't use gradient text for section headings.
Don't make every section the same centered heading plus equal-card grid.
Don't use purple-blue AI gradients, neon glow, or pure black backgrounds.
Don't rely on transparent glass cards in dark mode.
Don't add a blog section unless there is a real plan to maintain it.
